---
title: "TensorBasis"
generated: true
description: "An anisotropic tensor-product interaction smooth $f(x_1,  ldots, x_d)$."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TensorBasis -->
```python
class TensorBasis
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:TensorBasis -->
An anisotropic tensor-product interaction smooth
$f(x_1, \ldots, x_d)$.

Built from `d` marginal [`SplineBasis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/SplineBasis.qmd) (already sum-to-zero
constrained) by the **row-wise tensor product** of their designs and the
Kronecker-sum of per-margin penalties
$S_j = I \otimes \cdots P_j \cdots \otimes I$ -- so each margin
keeps its own smoothing parameter (selected jointly by the GAM
Fellner-Schall loop, which handles more than one penalty per smooth).  This
is mgcv's tensor **interaction** (`ti`): the marginal centring removes the
main effects, so the term models the *interaction* and stays identifiable
against the intercept; add marginal $s(x_j)$ smooths for a full
`te`.

The marginal penalties commute (Kronecker structure), so they are
**simultaneously diagonalisable**: `pen_eig[j]` is penalty $j$ in
the joint eigenbasis ($U_1 \otimes \cdots \otimes U_d$), which the
GAM engine uses to evaluate the smoothing-parameter trace
$\operatorname{tr}(S_\lambda^{+} S_j)$ as an elementwise sum --
cuSOLVER-free, no per-iteration pseudo-inverse -- while the fit itself keeps
the original (non-rotated) tensor basis.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TensorBasis.penalty_blocks -->
```python
penalty_blocks() -> list
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Return the per-margin penalty blocks.

One block per margin: the Kronecker-embedded penalty and its
joint-eigenbasis eigenvalues.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TensorBasis.eval_design -->
```python
eval_design(x: Tuple[Float[Array, ' g'], ...]) -> Float[Array, 'g K']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Re-evaluate the tensor design on matched per-margin grids.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TensorBasis.tree_flatten -->
```python
tree_flatten() -> Tuple[Tuple[Any, ...], Tuple[int, ...]]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TensorBasis.tree_unflatten -->
```python
tree_unflatten(aux: Tuple[int, ...], children: Tuple[Any, ...]) -> 'TensorBasis'
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TensorBasis.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(design: Float[Array, 'n K'], penalties: Float[Array, 'd K K'], pen_eig: Float[Array, 'd K'], margins: Tuple[SplineBasis, ...], dims: Tuple[int, ...]) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:TensorBasis -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `K` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
